LAHARL-AYE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].

LAHARL-NAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Hits twice if you have [gold]Ego[/gold].

LAHARL-DENIED.description:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.

LAHARL-NETHER_SLASH.title: Nether Slash

LAHARL-UNDYING_WILL.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. 
Gain {EgoPower:diff()} [gold]Ego[/gold]. 
Triple strength gain if you have less than [blue]20%[/blue] HP.

LAHARL-OVERLORD_SHOWDOWN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
The enemy gains {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. 
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.

LAHARL-PRINNY_EXPLOSION.title: Prinny Explosion
LAHARL-OVERWHELMING_ODDS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Double block gained if you have less than [blue]50%[/blue] HP.
LAHARL-OVERWHELMING_ODDS.title: Overwhelming Odds
LAHARL-PRINNY_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. 
Apply an additional [gold]Weak[/gold] if you have [gold]Ego[/gold].
LAHARL-PRINNY_WAVE.title: Prinny Wave
LAHARL-FALSE_OVERLORD.description:

LAHARL-PANIC.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Gain 1 [gold]Ego[/gold]. If you draw a Skill, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LAHARL-PANIC.title: Panic, Dood!
LAHARL-ROYAL_BULLY.description:

Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Weak[/gold] on the enemy.
LAHARL-ROYAL_BULLY.title: Royal Bully

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies 3 times. 
Hit 2 additional times if you have [gold]Ego[/gold].
LAHARL-GET_THEM_IDIOTS.title: Get Them, Idiots!
LAHARL-SIS_LORD_SKY_FIST.description:
